notes: All 167 tests pass. heat_flux_cbc.py (--N 200000) crashed with CUDA_ERROR_ILLEGAL_INSTRUCTION; heat flux scan taken from dimits_clean.py (300k particles). Linear growth rate 1.18 is above physical 0.1-0.3 range — likely due to the single-mode projection with high pert_amp saturation effects at steps 20-100. Dimits threshold R/LT=6.9 consistent with reference ~6.0. chi_i jumps from ~0.09 at R/LT=6.0 to ~0.22 at R/LT=6.9, qualitatively correct Dimits shift. Timing: ~27 steps/sec at both 100k and 500k particles (GPU-bound, good scaling).
